title: E-PCA Ride Addon
description: This is an add-on mod for End-Parasitize and Convert All, which allows players to tame the parasites from End-Parasitize and Convert All and ride on them.
body:
**Introduction:**
This is an add-on mod for End-Parasitize and Convert All, which allows players to tame the parasites from End-Parasitize and Convert All and ride on them.
You can use meat to feed parasites to tame them, after which you can right-click to sit on them. Tamed parasites will show friendliness to their owner. Players can use a bizarre mushroom fishing rod to control the movement of ridden parasites.

 

**介绍：**
这是一个 终末-归寄万物 的附属模组，玩家可以驯服寄生体并骑乘它们。
你可以使用肉类来喂食寄生体以驯服它们，随后便可以右键它们坐在上面，驯服后的寄生体会对它的主人表现友好。玩家可以使用诡异菌钓竿来控制被骑乘的寄生体的移动。
